header.name: Fuel tanks test
header.description: Simple fuel tank for unit testing

versionInfo.description: First test set with different tank and vessel types
versionInfo.creator: Marko Alder

connection.name: Connection 4
connection.description: Connection from fuselage to outer flow

wingAirfoil.name: NACA0009 Airfoil
wingAirfoil.description: NACA 4-digit symmetrical airfoil with a thickness of 9percent

fuselageProfile.name: Circle
fuselageProfile.description: Profile build up from set of Points on Circle where may Dimensions are 1..-1

fuselageProfile.name: NACA0009 Airfoil
fuselageProfile.description: NACA 4-digit symmetrical airfoil with a thickness of 9percent

guideCurveProfile.name: Upper Guide Curve Profile
guideCurveProfile.description: This profile is used for tank test cases

guideCurveProfile.name: Starbord Guide Curve Profile
guideCurveProfile.description: This profile is used for tank test cases

guideCurveProfile.name: Lower Guide Curve Profile
guideCurveProfile.description: This profile is used for tank test cases

guideCurveProfile.name: Port Guide Curve Profile
guideCurveProfile.description: This profile is used for tank test cases
